text: Taurus rising. Venus in Pisces in the 11th house, north node in Gemini in the 2nd house, and Saturn in Scorpio in the 7th house. Last few years have been pretty bad…and last few months have been worse. My dad died unexpectedly a few years ago (2023), and then my husband emotionally cheated on me shortly after. Then, just about a month ago, found out my husband had been cheating on me with my half sister (who seduced him, which doesn’t at all excuse what he did, but hurt twice as much, because she’s my sister, that I’ve known my whole life) for months, and then my mom died unexpectedly almost 2 weeks ago. I am finally getting closer to achieving my dream though, which is to have enough land to grow a food forest, and teach people about native plants and foraging. I finally got the land, and have started working on the food forest! Lessons I’ve attracted are to 1) trust my intuition, 2) don’t trust words, trust actions and patterns, 3) I’m stronger than I ever thought possible. Luckily, things always end up working out for me in the end; I’m divinely protected, and the universe always provides…eventually.

text:
Venus in Gemini 2nd House, North Node in Libra 6th, currently in my Saturn Return in Aries 12th House. This one’s personal.
I grew up with nothing stable. No money, no safety net. So I trained myself to expect things to fail before they even start. It’s easier to brace for the worst than to hope and get let down again. Never went to university because school made me feel stupid, even though deep down I knew I wasn’t. Self doubt won that fight. So I took a retail job that was never supposed to last and stayed 9 years.
